parsed.production_notes: The video combines a 3D animated AI avatar in the top half with a human-recorded video in the bottom half. The AI avatar has a stylized, Pixar-like appearance with smooth movements and perfect lighting, contrasting with the natural imperfections and lighting of the human footage.

characters.appearance: Male, 20s-30s, medium build, fair complexion. He has curly dark hair and wears dark-rimmed glasses. His features are stylized and animated.
Male, 40s-50s, stocky build, olive complexion. He has short dark hair with some graying and a stubble beard.
characters.wardrobe: A rust-orange t-shirt and white wireless earbuds.
characters.demeanor: Eager to learn, slightly hesitant but willing to try.

scenes.setting: Top: A cozy, warmly lit room with a window and string lights. Bottom: A darker room with blurred warm string lights in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a medium close-up, looking directly at the camera. He is positioned in the center of the frame. The background is a cozy room with warm, inviting lighting. There is a window behind him to the right, and blurred string lights are visible in the background to the left. He makes subtle conversational gestures with his hands and head.

Character B is framed in a close-up, looking directly at the camera. He is centered in the frame. The background is dark, with out-of-focus warm string lights draped vertically behind him on the left side. The lighting on his face is slightly uneven, typical of a webcam or smartphone recording. He reacts to the conversation with facial expressions and slight head movements.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with a 3D animated character on top and a real human on the bottom. Both characters are looking directly at the camera, appearing to have a video call conversation. Text overlays appear in the center of the screen, translating their spoken dialogue. The top half has a bright, cozy aesthetic, while the bottom half is darker with bokeh lighting.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Tu parles français? [Do you speak French?]
Character B says: Yes, a little. Je suis faim. [I am hunger.]
Character A says: Non, non, on dit: j'ai faim. En français, tu n'es pas faim, tu as faim. [No, no, we say: I have hunger. In French, you are not hunger, you have hunger.]
Character B says: J'ai faim. [I am hungry.]
Character A says: Qu'est-ce que tu veux manger? [What do you want to eat?]
Character B says: Je veux le pizza margherita. [I want the margherita pizza.]
Character A says: Attention: la pizza. Pizza c'est féminin. [Careful: the pizza. Pizza is feminine.]
Character B says: Je veux la pizza margherita. [I want the margherita pizza.]
Character A says: Et à boire? [And to drink?]
Character B says: Je veux de l'eau. [I want some water.]
Character A says: Mieux: Je voudrais de l'eau, s'il te plaît. Plus poli. [Better: I would like some water, please. More polite.]
Character B says: Je voudrais de l'eau, s'il te plaît. [I would like some water, please.]
Character A says: Parfait! Ton français s'améliore. [Perfect! Your French is improving.]
Character B says: Thanks! Wait, who are you?
Character A says: Je suis un tuteur IA sur Praktika. On parle chaque jour, ton français devient parfait. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We speak every day, your French becomes perfect.]
Character B says: Okay, downloading Praktika now.

panels.panel_visual_description: A completely blank, solid white screen with no other elements or details.

scenes.visual_description: A solid white screen serves as the background for the app's logo and download information. A purple app icon with a white 'P' shape appears in the center, followed by the app name and app store badges below it.
